rationale: The 'King & Queen' name implies regal, premium positioning. Original site has no consistent palette to extract from (only generic stock template colors). Going with a classic, masculine-yet-elegant barbershop scheme: deep ink black anchor, warm antique gold accent (the 'regal' note), cream paper background for warmth, with neutrals for typography.

palette.usage: Primary text, hero backgrounds, dark sections
Primary accent — buttons, highlights, dividers, regal flourishes
Hover state for gold accent, deeper trim
